archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) for Light, Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) for Dark

structure: Header: Crystal Glassmorphism, sticky top, flex-between. Contains Logo (typography-based) and Dark Mode Toggle.
Input Area (Sanskrit): Spans col-span-5. Tall, seamless textarea with generous p-8 padding. Uses flat background with a 1px solid subtle border to ground it.

Output Area: Spans col-span-7. Composed of 3 stacked horizontal cards (Marathi, Hindi, English). Each card uses a 1px solid border, flat surface. Includes translation text, confidence bar (thin, h-1), and utility icon row (copy, feedback).
History Section: Rendered as a Shadcn Sheet (Drawer) triggered from a 'History' button in the Header to keep the main view uncluttered.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary button (Translate) gets a solid primary fill with sharp 0px radius.
components.inputs: Shadcn Textarea for inputs. Overridden to remove default focus rings. Custom focus: focus:border-primary focus:bg-surface.
components.progress: Shadcn Progress used for Confidence Score. Height overridden to h-1. Color mapped to primary.
components.feedback: Shadcn Popover or Collapsible for 'Correction Input' revealing an input field when thumbs down is clicked.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 on output cards. Opacity transitions on utility icons.
motion.transitions: transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out for background color shifts (dark/light toggle).

images.description: Ancient inscriptions used as a very low opacity (3-5%) background texture overlay on the body via a fixed pseudo-element, adding subtle Indic depth.
Used in the empty state of the translation output area. A moody, cropped image to fill the negative space before a translation is performed.

accessibility.contrast: APCA contrast rules applied. Text must meet 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid on all interactive elements: language-selector, translate-btn, copy-btn, thumbs-up-btn, thumbs-down-btn, theme-toggle, history-btn, sanskrit-input, correction-input.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Vite with React and JS (not TS).
Install required libraries: lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Install Shadcn components: button, textarea, progress, sheet, popover, input.
Set up Tailwind dark mode class strategy using a Context Provider.
Import Google Fonts: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans Devanagari' in index.css.
Implement the Layout Strategy EXACTLY as specified. Use the asymmetric grid (col-span-5 vs col-span-7).
Apply 'Cormorant Garamond' for all headings and branding.
Ensure the Translation Output cards stack gracefully on mobile.
